files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -euo pipefail
-ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd -P)"
 APP_NAME="RepoBar"
 APP_PROCESS_PATTERN="${APP_NAME}.app/Contents/MacOS/${APP_NAME}"
 CACHE_PATH="${HOME}/Library/Caches/RepoBar/swiftpm"
